name: Eikþyrnir - Winter Reindeer
description:
Who's that coming to deliver the gifts? It's not Santa, but a big hulking man dressed as a reindeer!

It is Eikþyrnir of the Healing Hands of Yggdrasill!

Wanted to try and get this done just in time for Christmas! I absolutely love the giant buff deer man from Fire Emblem, so I wanted to try and do something here!

Still a bit new at bot making, so please let me know if something is amiss!

Artwork is the official game art of Christmas Eikþyrnir by P-POCO

A little AI phone editing was used to remove some of the game UI for better picture.
creator: Nobody207
